headline: Is Host Hotels Stock a Smart Buy Before Q1 Earnings Release?
summary: HST readies for Q1 earnings with rising revenues expected, but higher interest costs may have weighed on AFFO per share.

headline: IIPR's Q1 AFFO & Revenues Beat Estimates on Strong Leasing Momentum
summary: IIPR tops Q1 estimates as leasing gains and IQHQ income boost results, even as revenue dips and tenant defaults weigh on year-over-year performance.
